subject: fix(ui): complete Chart.js theme sync and cleanup dead code
body:
Add state.darkMode to all 11 chart useMemo dependency arrays so
react-chartjs-2 recreates chart options on theme toggle, picking up
the new Chart.js defaults set in AppContext's darkMode effect.

Without this, toggling dark/light mode updated the global defaults
but existing chart instances kept stale axis label and grid colors
because their options props hadn't changed by reference.

Also removes dead code from the previous commit:
- Unused useRef import in App.jsx (heatmap tooltip was the only user)
- Stale class="heatmap-tooltip" on the portal mount div in index.html

Tags: bugfix, react, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: react-migration
Semver: patch
